2_open_and_merge_ops_pr.title: fix(travel-agent): drop trailing audit/callback chain; render_* is the workflow tail

4_smoke_terminal_widget_visibility.report_command_note: The report command rendered the widget, but the one-line summary still printed result=-. That appears to be a formatter issue, not a missing render payload; noetl status shows result.render is non-null.

5_smoke_canvas.notes: The /travel page header is updated and points at automation/agents/travel/runtime, but submitting a query from the canvas navigated back to /catalog and no persisted canvas chat/widget was visible after returning to /travel. No fresh 422 was observed after hard reload; the remaining behavior is a canvas state/navigation issue rather than the old playbook-path 422.

6_smoke_amadeus_mcp_regression.notes: Direct distributed executions of automation/agents/mcp/amadeus tools/list, get_token, search_locations, and search_flights all completed at the NoETL level. The prompt /mcp/amadeus flow began correctly, but the result-shape fields are not surfaced through noetl status because that MCP playbook still ends in its own trailing end step.

regressions_found.name: /travel canvas submit does not keep/render the chat result
regressions_found.details: After hard reload on GUI v1.10.1, /travel showed the updated agent-runtime copy. Submitting from the canvas led back to /catalog and no widget/chat bubble was visible when returning to /travel. Terminal prompt path is green, so this is isolated to the canvas surface.

regressions_found.name: report command summary still says result=- even while rendering widget
regressions_found.details: report 622795473002168855 displayed the widget below the report, but the textual summary line still included result=-. The canonical noetl status check confirms result.render is non-null.

notes: The core structural fix worked: render_* as workflow tail makes execution.result.render non-null.
The terminal-style prompt acceptance is green for help, flights, and locations, including friendly error widgets for Amadeus 500 responses.

The canvas acceptance remains amber and likely needs a GUI-focused follow-up. The stale playbook constant is fixed, but the canvas submit/state flow is still not preserving a visible assistant message/widget.
No GREEN validation log paragraph was appended because /travel canvas did not satisfy the widget-below-chat-bubble criterion.
deferred_followups: Fix /travel canvas submit/state flow so direct-mode execution stays on /travel and appends the assistant message with result.render.
Audit table re-add as side effect inside each render_* python step (psycopg) when needed.
Gateway SSE callback re-add as side effect inside render_* (urllib POST) when gateway-mode round picks up.
Multi-provider keychain (anthropic/vertex/ollama) once OpenAI baseline closes.
Phase 2: travel agent uses Amadeus MCP server internally.
Tighten the report summary formatter so it no longer prints result=- when a render payload exists.
